steps.t: Corsair weapons can be found in the village of Tungobel. Steal weapons from Corsair forces.
Erchar can be found at his encampment in the western end of Dor-en-Ernil, south-west of Tungobel. Return the weapons to Erchar.
The weapons barrel can be found at Erchar's encampment in the western end of Dor-en-Ernil. Put the weapons in the barrel.
Erchar can be found at his encampment in the western end of Dor-en-Ernil. Return the weapons to Erchar.
